# Rolling Oaks Daylilies

Rolling Oaks Daylilies is an AHS Display Garden offering named daylilies and
seedlings. The catalog includes more than 1,000 varieties, with a focus on
double and white daylilies, spiders, unusual forms, doubles, and unique forms.

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://rollingoaksdaylilies.com/
- Catalogs: https://rollingoaksdaylilies.com/catalogs
- For Sale: https://rollingoaksdaylilies.com/catalog/for-sale
- All Daylilies: https://rollingoaksdaylilies.com/catalog/all
- Search: https://rollingoaksdaylilies.com/catalog/search
- Sitemap: https://rollingoaksdaylilies.com/sitemap.xml
- API Catalog: https://rollingoaksdaylilies.com/.well-known/api-catalog
- OpenAPI: https://rollingoaksdaylilies.com/openapi.json

## Ordering Notes

Customers should use the catalog and cart to identify plants of interest, then
contact Rolling Oaks Daylilies to confirm availability before payment. The site
does not expose an agent API, OAuth flow, MCP server, or agent-native checkout
protocol.

## Agent Guidance

- Use canonical listing URLs from the sitemap when citing individual daylilies.
- Use the public catalog API when structured data is better than scraping:
  - `GET /api/catalogs`
  - `GET /api/catalog/{catalog}?page=1&limit=24`
  - `GET /api/listings/{listing}`
- Respect availability language on listing pages; a listed cultivar may be
  display-only or require confirmation.
- Only submit `POST /api/forms` after the user has reviewed and confirmed the
  inquiry text and any personal contact information.
- Prefer the `Accept: text/markdown` representation for concise summaries of
  core site pages.
